STEPS how to earn YOUR first BTC and USD:

1 STEP : SIGN UP & CONFIRM YOUR EMAIL


 Link For Sign Up & Confirm Your Mail  on Gomining

 

2 STEP : START YOUR BONUS MINER FOR YOUR FIRST BTC REWARDS

 Unlock Your first Digital miner for Earn Your BTC. Start for FREE activation and Follow GOMININC on social media. After that You claim about 5-6 day of mining with Bonus Miner 16 TH. This Bonus Miner You will Earn About 1 USD/PER DAY

Link For Sign Up & Start Your Bonus Miner

 

3 STEP : BUY YOUR FIRST DIGITAL MINER BTC FOR LIFE

Buy your first BTC miner for the life. Start from 21 usd and claim your BTC rewards every day.

 

This will be your first rewards in BTC every day

Link For Sign Up & BUY YOUR FIRST Miner

 

4 STEP : START YOUR BOUNTY PROGRAM  AND CLAIM  BONUS IN USD

FIND BOUNTY PROGRAM CONFIRM IMAGES AND TAKE PART TO COMPLETE TASKS

 

Login to Telegram and confirm instructions by telegram bot to LEAVE A COMMENT ON social media REDDIT. After confirmation you will bring 50 points -it's about 10 USD

 

 

 

Now your first experience with GoMining has brought you your first Bitcoin and USD rewards. These rewards will appear in your virtual wallet, and you can either withdraw them immediately or reinvest and continue exploring GoMining. You can buy your first lifetime miner and keep earning Bitcoin. You can also complete Bounty program tasks to earn points equivalent to USD. It's important to remember that GoMining is an official Bitcoin mining platform and everything you earn will be safely stored in your wallet.

 Link For Sign Up on Gomining
